description: A general relationship between two or more entities.
A person holds a role within an organization.
An entity belongs to or is part of another entity.
An actor performs an action on or against a target.
A speaker makes a statement or claim about a topic.
An entity produces, creates, or generates something.
An entity is located in a place.
An event occurs at a time or place.
An entity engages in a transaction with another.
A regulatory body takes action regarding a regulated entity.
